Because the lower results bring on the worst events multiple passes through the same path carry greater risk Of mishap: This rule does not apply to subpaths taken immediately fol: lowing path or another subpath because these are considered part of the same path _ The modifier only applies if character returns to the path or subpath after leaving it: AFFILIATIONS The BattleTech universe is vast; with long and checkered history: Its people come from wildly different backgrounds_ interstellar nations that span hundreds of worlds and thou- sands of cultures An MW3 character is born or raised into one of these affiliations which has profound effect on every char acter' development: This section describes the most prominent and powertul affiliations in the BattleTech universe , including background and character creation material for each one_ Players may find helpful to read Brief History of the Inner Sphere (p: 1591 before reading this material; that historical overview will aid in understanding each affiliation as part of the larger BattleTech universe
Combine bears striking resemblance to Japan of the shogun era_ where daimyos lords rule their worlds and military dis- tricts while their samurai mostly MechWarriors enforce their word as Iaw: From highest to lowest, all act for the greater glory of the Draconis Combine and its ruling House Kurita With a eye toward keeping its people under strict control, House Kurita has enforced rigid social hierarchy: nobility war: riors middle class workers and unproductives Because rulers place so much emphasis on controlling ad channeling the lives Combine citizens, the realm suffers from deplorable lack of formal education except in the military: which boasts some the finer schools in the Inner Sphere_ The vast majority of Combine citizens are illiterate. positive side effect ot this deprivation however; iS the emergence of rich oral tra- dition filled with lore that spans centuries Because most Combine citizens believe in their society 5 innate superiority and see other societies and governments as corrupting influence they regard most other realms ene mies. Historically, the neighboring Federated Suns and Lyran Alliance have been the Combine" principal foes The Combine has had infrequent contact with the Free Worlds League and Capellan Confederation , and it tends to regard both with con tempt, if somewhat lesser enmity: The past several decades have exposed distinct demarca tion lines in the Combine concerning the status quo of seven centuries, Led by (he current  Coordinator, Theodore Kurita_ numerous reforms have relaxed the rigid social structure while fostering alliances with other Great Houses The underworld yakuza also have greater leeway for their activities and Many of these changes stem from the Coordinator" efforostto rid his realm of the Clans ad retake the worlds they conquered, However; some Combine nobles oppose these changes and seek to return t0 traditional ways _ They have formed secret society known as the Black Dragons and will stop at nothing to reverse the Combine course
USING AFFILIATIONS Every player must choose an affiliation for each character at the start of character creation The gamemaster may want to restrict access to certain affiliations based on the direction his campaign will take For example; Clan characters may notfit into certain Inner Sphere-based campaigns Each affiliation description begins with brief background sketch to give you sense of its history and culture (see also the color pages for each affiliation). This information  should help you choose the right affiliation for your character: The Game Material section for each affiliation includes any extras character from that affiliation might receive_ like bonus Skill Points_ traits and other information such as restrictions on what paths they can follow. Keep in mind that player characters get the listed bonus skills traits and s0 on because they are exceptional individuals; These do not necessarily apply t0 every man, woman and child in each affiliation.
Game Material Primary Language: Japanese Secondary Languages: Swedenese, Arabic, English Bonus Skllls: Art/Oral Traditions +3_ Martial Arts Karate choose one: Staffs +1, Archery +1 or Throwing Weapons +2 Bonus Traits:   Quirk /Xenophobia; Pain Resistance and Combat Sense traits each cost one Character Point less than normal (2 and 3 points respectively) because most Combine characters are so highly disciplined. Path    Restrictions: Draconis Combine characters cannot enter the High School Path. Child Iabor is legal in most parts the Combine; if character cannot qualify for any other Stage Stage paths he can go to Stage and enter the worktorce , taking Civilian Job and ignoring the listed prerequisites_
DRACONIS COMBINE (HOUSE KURITAJ The first full-scale interstellar   military operation was launched in 2303, and eventually Ied t0 the formation of the Draconis Combine in 2319_ Unlike other Inner Sphere nations_ which were formed through the union of  already established alliances of planets_ the Draconis Combine owed its birth t0 one world and the indomitable will of one man: Shiro Kurita. Though Shiro used political wrangling when it suited him, he construct- ed the Combine mainly by the sword Raised in strict adherence to the ancient Japanese code of bushido (the way of the war- rior) Shiro spread this philosophy as he expanded his empire Today; seven centuries after foundation , the Draconis
